title: SpotifyLink
description: Create a connection between Spotify and Minecraft in the most innovative way!
body: Text Transcript SPOTIFYLINK | Create a connection between Spotify and Minecraft in the most innovative way! [FREE Discord Support | Full Documented Plugin] > FEATURES: - Fully Customizable GUIs, Messages and Config - Custom Model Data Support - HEX Color code Support - Folia Support - Version Support: 1.21.x - 1.18 > Major Features: - CHAT CONTROL PANEL: View, preview and play tracks in real time and manage them only just with few clicks on the chat! - MODERN SYSTEM VIA CHAT: You can control your currently played music in real time via chat! The plugin has 7 Placeholders. - PLAY MUSIC FROM GUI: Don't like the chat control solution? No problem! Control your music via GUI and also see your playlists and tracks!
